case_title: CAREY SEBERA VS. AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SEBERA, CAREY AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-28-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC. HEARING SET FOR JUL-29-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2011 - DEPT. 506, JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, MATTER WAS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHITBIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2011 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (MOTION TO VACATE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEBERA, CAREY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL (MOTION TO VACATE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF IS "APPROVED", TRIAL CONTINUED TO AUG-26-2011 AT 3:30 PM DEPT.#506. PER JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC. SET FOR JUL-29-2011 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-26-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN 506.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEBERA, CAREY AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEBERA, CAREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC. ON AUG-26-2011 - DENIED. MOTION WAS UNTIMELY FILED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.
